6 Delivery
Returns & Delivery Policy

If you wish to return any of the products purchased, you have a 21 day period from when the order was purchased to write to us via email at [email protected].

The email must include your order number & your reason for Return. You will be responsible for Returns Shipping Cost, this is providing a solution cannot be solved to your query.

You are responsible for the parcel until it has been received by VerveSport. It is recommended to use the signed-for postage option.

The product is to be returned in its original packaging & unused form.

A refund will be issued within 7 days via original payment method.

We DO NOT accept returns on customised items unless we are at fault.

All Policies

Returns & Refunds Policy

We take immense pride in creating unique sportswear for teams & individuals — we aim to make sure you're 100% satisfied. If for any reason you're not, you have 21 days from the date you receive your order to write to us.

How to Request a Return:

Email us at [email protected] with your Customer Number and the reason for return.

Call/Whatsapp us on +44 7774659341 with your Customer Number and the reason for return.

Please note: Returns must be approved before sending the item back.

Return Conditions:

Items must be returned unused and in their original packaging. You are responsible for the return shipping costs, unless the issue cannot be resolved or we are at fault. We strongly recommend using a tracked/signed-for service as you are responsible for the item until it is received by us.

Return Address: VerveSport, Unit 11 Hyperion Building, FY2 0FH, Lancashire, UK

Refund Process:

Refunds will be processed within 7 days of receiving the returned item. Refunds will be issued to your original payment method.

Customised Orders:

We DO NOT accept returns or offer refunds on customised/personalised items unless there is a clear printing error or fault caused by us. Due to the nature of garment printing, we cannot accept returns for minor imperfections smaller than 1cm, as these fall within acceptable tolerance levels.

Shipping Information

We offer reliable, fast shipping options across the United Kingdom. All orders are shipped using Royal Mail Tracked services, and no signature is required upon delivery.

Standard UK Shipping

FREE on orders over £30 · £2.99 on orders under £30 · Delivery: 2–5 business days

Express UK Shipping

£5.00 flat rate · Delivery: 1–2 business days

Production & Dispatch Times

Teamwear:

Match Day Kits: Peak season (Apr–Oct): 14–21 days | Off-season (Nov–Mar): 10–14 days

Pro-X Range (Standard Colours): Immediate dispatch

Pro-X Range (Bespoke Colours): 4–5 weeks production time

Club Shop items: Available for immediate dispatch

Boxing & Activewear:

Fight Night T-Shirts: 3–5 days production

Activewear: Immediate dispatch

All other products: Available for immediate dispatch.

At this time, VerveSport only accepts orders within the United Kingdom. We are working on expanding our international shipping options soon. Please contact our team for a bulk order outside of the UK.

Customisation Disclaimer

For customised garments, ensure all details (names, sizes, colours, numbers, etc.) are correct before confirming your order. We do not take responsibility for errors submitted during the order process once production has started.

Product Imagery & Colours

Product images are for illustrative purposes. Due to screen displays and photography lighting, colours may vary slightly from the final product. Where possible, physical samples or size guides are available upon request for larger team orders.

Production Errors

In the rare event of a manufacturing or printing error on your order, we will provide a replacement or refund at no additional cost to you. Please report any issues within 72 hours of receiving your item.

Submit for Approval

VerveSport will be in contact within 48hrs of submitting this form to check your order & any questions you have. Payment link is active for 7 days.
